Türkçe

Dr. Remzi Orkun Güner completed his undergraduate education at Istanbul Bilgi University Faculty of Law and his postgraduate education at the same university in the Human Rights Law Program. Güner, who completed the doctoral program in public law at Ankara University Faculty of Law in 2019, continued his postdoctoral studies as a visiting researcher at the Department of Comparative Political Science at Humboldt University of Berlin and at Berlin Freie University. He works in areas such as philosophy and sociology of law, contemporary human rights theories, political philosophy, critical legal studies, gender and law.

Güner joined the Department of Philosophy and Sociology of Law at Kadir Has University Faculty of Law as a visiting professor.
